commands.title: Build B-Material apk release
commands.commands:
cd D:\Desktop\AndroidProjects\B-Material
gradlew clean assembleRelease
explorer app\build\outputs\apk\release

commands.title: Install AAECarMedia apk
commands.commands:
# Khối lệnh này hiện tại chạy có thể chưa thành công!
adb root
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb remount
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb disable-verity

adb reboot
adb wait-for-device



adb shell rm -f /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk

adb push "D:/Downloads/AAECarMediaApp.apk" /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk

adb shell chmod 755 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp
adb shell chmod 644 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk

adb reboot
adb wait-for-device

adb root
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb remount
powershell -NoProfile -Command "Start-Sleep -Seconds 2"

adb shell chmod 755 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp
adb shell chmod 644 /system/priv-app/AAECarMediaApp/AAECarMediaApp.apk
